title: Uniblock Webhook Event
description: Schema representing webhook event payloads delivered by Uniblock when blockchain events matching configured filters are detected.

data.description: The event-specific data payload. Structure varies by event type.

WebhookMetadata.description: Common metadata included in all webhook event payloads.

webhookId.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription that triggered this notification.

eventType.description: The type of blockchain event that triggered the webhook.

chain.description: The blockchain network on which the event occurred.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was detected by Uniblock.

AddressActivityData.description: Data payload for address activity events.

address.description: The monitored address involved in the activity.

direction.description: Whether the address was the sender or receiver.

value.description: The value transferred in the native token's smallest unit.

blockNumber.description: The block number containing the transaction.

TokenTransferData.description: Data payload for token transfer events.

transactionHash.description: The hash of the transaction containing the transfer.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the transferred token.

tokenName.description: The name of the transferred token.

tokenSymbol.description: The symbol of the transferred token.

value.description: The amount transferred in the token's smallest unit.

decimals.description: The number of decimal places for the token.

blockNumber.description: The block number containing the transfer.

NftTransferData.description: Data payload for NFT transfer events.

transactionHash.description: The hash of the transaction containing the transfer.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the NFT collection.

tokenId.description: The token ID of the transferred NFT.

quantity.description: The number of tokens transferred (relevant for ERC-1155).

blockNumber.description: The block number containing the transfer.

MinedTransactionData.description: Data payload for mined transaction events.

transactionHash.description: The hash of the mined transaction.

value.description: The value transferred in the native token's smallest unit.

status.description: The execution status of the transaction.

blockNumber.description: The block number in which the transaction was mined.

gasUsed.description: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.
